text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One night during camp...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've been pondering, Trainer. Has this<n>thought
ever dawned upon you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
People say that the ruler of the sea,<n>Poseidon, and
the power he grants<n>are merely the stuff of fairy
tales.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But Poseidon does exist.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Go on, listen for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Fsshhh! Fsshhh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Splash, splash...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Can you not hear something<n>emerging from the
deep?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Poseidon has come to spark the next<n>stage of my
evolution.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Splash, splash...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It does sound like footsteps in the<n>water. But they
couldn't possibly<n>belong to Poseidon...
Heh heh, heh heh heh heh!
Your god of the sea doesn't exist.<n>But...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The Phantom Bird does!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Gah! It's you?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Es verdad! I'm the world's<n>strongest, a member
of the Golden<n>Generation, and I'm hot on your
heels!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa, the Phantom Bird,<n>has landed!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A superstar runner with worldwide<n>acclaim now
stands before us.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's one of the Umamusume from<n>the Golden
Generation that T.M.<n>Opera O has set her sights
on.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I know who you are, Opera O. You're<n>the one
aimin' to be the top ruler!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But in this battle royale, you're on the<n>receivin'
end of everyone's attack.<n>It's gonna be a world
of hurt.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: H-how do you know this?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've got a bird's-eye view over<n>everything.
There's nothin' that<n>happens without me
knowin'.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So, I'll offer ya some pointers. Then<n>you can fight
with your head held high<n>and come out victorious,
no matter<n>how many people are after ya!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Lending your strength to the<n>Overlord, are
you? Most appreciated!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So, what do we do first? Some<n>partner running?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We're gonna wrestle.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Pardon?

If you wanna learn to fight, there's<n>nothin' better
than wrestlin'! Go put<n>on your ring attire.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not entirely sure why, but Opera O<n>ends up
wrestling against El Condor<n>Pasa.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Ding!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Kay, Opera O, bring it! Fight like the<n>overlord you
say you are!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What're ya gonna do when<n>everyone's bearin'
down on you?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Try takin' this, for starters! Condor<n>Rush!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa unleashes a flurry of<n>karate
chops! T.M. Opera O, on the<n>receiving end...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah hah hah! 'Tis a simple matter!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With my adept stage dancing, I can<n>evade any and
all attacks by the<n>slimmest of margins!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You see? This is how a true ruler<n>does battle!
Even if I come under a<n>barrage of cannon fire, I
can use my<n>conserved energy to attain total
victory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That's right, isn't it, El? This is what<n>you wished
to convey!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Interestin'. Sure, that style does<n>conserve energy,
but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's not how a ruler fights!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Does an overlord just run and run,<n>sneakin' their
way to victory?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ngh! What?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Even if ya win, ya can't call that<n>victory. That's no
lordly fightin'...<n>That's a tactic for cravens!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh?! Craven! I have never been<n>paired with
such a humiliating title!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To have become the Craven Lord in<n>my quest for
strength—ohh, how I<n>have fallen.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'll show ya the type of fightin' you<n>should be
striving for!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Opera O! Lemme have your<n>best finishing
move!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My... ultimate Overlord technique?!<n>The one which
can obliterate six<n>galaxies in a flash?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
This has gotten way too ridiculous for<n>me to butt
in. I decide to sit back and<n>just watch.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh! Hehehe... As you wish. Do not<n>regret it when
you disintegrate to<n>dust.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Prepare for my supreme move! The<n>Overlord
Principal Galaxion!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: BOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She unleashes an explosive<n>technique that defies
all words!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Mnrrrgh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?! You took the blow head-on?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How can you still stand?! More<n>importantly, why
did you not evade?<n>You're more than capable.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Why? 'Cause this is how a ruler<n>fights!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Take everything they throw at ya...<n>and win. A true
champ doesn't run,<n>even when it's you against
everyone.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Takin' one on the chin gets the fans<n>riveted!
Fightin' back makes 'em<n>roar!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Prove you've got the most muscle<n>and overpower
every last hit! That's<n>what a real champ does!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?! She vanished...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: WHOMP!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa drives T.M. Opera O<n>into the sand
with a powerful,<n>high-speed tackle.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Ding, ding, ding!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The match is over, and important<n>lessons have
been learned.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have my thanks, El. My eyes are<n>finally open
after that flawless blow.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Even if my entire competition singles<n>me out, I
must meet them head-on.<n>That is what makes the
Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No... That is how the CenturialOverlord does battle. Do I have itcorrect this time?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí. Tryin' for distance just means<n>you're afraid of
gettin' passed.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The strong don't care if they win by a<n>nose,
'cause they know for a fact<n>nobody'll overtake
'em.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And with that said, hasta luego!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I swear to turn your teachings<n>into shining
success on the track!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so, the Phantom Bird returns to<n>the sea.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Argh! Gulp! Ptoo! I shouldn't havetried to swim back!
